# transfemme-tailoring

> A first-person build log and interactive alteration calculators for refitting
> oversized, masculine-cut formalwear into a well-fitted transfeminine silhouette.
> Start with `README.md` (the source-of-record) and `AGENTS.md` (the agent contract).

## Canonical

- [Agent contract](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Claude contract](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/CLAUDE.md)
- [README](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/README.md)
- [Repo manifest](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/tinyland.repo.json)
- [Repo manifest schema](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/docs/schemas/tinyland-repo-manifest.schema.json)
- [Agent adoption flow](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/docs/agent-adoption.md)
- [CI schema](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/docs/CI-SCHEMA.md)
- [Repo taxonomy and GitOps convergence](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/docs/spec/tinyland-repo-taxonomy-and-gitops-contract-2026-05-19.md)
- [Justfile](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/Justfile)
- [Bazel wrapper](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/scripts/gloriousflywheel-bazel.sh)

## Skills

- [tinyland-flywheel-bazel](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/.agents/skills/tinyland-flywheel-bazel/SKILL.md): cache-first Bazel and GloriousFlywheel RBE wiring.
- [tinyland-static-spoke](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/.agents/skills/tinyland-static-spoke/SKILL.md): static spoke site customization and projection rules.
- [tinyland-repo-contract](https://github.com/jesssullivan/transfemme-tailoring/blob/main/.agents/skills/tinyland-repo-contract/SKILL.md): Just, Nix, gitleaks, validation, and no-ad-hoc-file contract.

## Content

- [Overview](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/)
- [Machine setup & the treadle restoration](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/machine)
- [Tools & BOM](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/tools)
- [Fitting theory & calculators](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/fitting)
- [My measurements (private, localStorage-backed profile)](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/measurements)
- [Dress pants](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/pants)
- [Dress shirts](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/shirts)
- [Vests / waistcoats](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/vests)
- [Suit coats](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/coats)

## Agent Routes

- [Agent AX map](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/agent)
- [Machine route map](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/agent-map.md)
- [Sitemap](https://jesssullivan.github.io/transfemme-tailoring/sitemap.xml)

## Operating Constraints

- Use `just <recipe>` for every repo operation.
- Use `nix develop --command just <recipe>` in CI.
- Keep Flywheel endpoints and credentials in environment-owned authority, never source.
- Run gitleaks through Justfile recipes.
- Keep static spokes static. Do not add runtime auth, database, payment, or broker-fetch behavior.
